title: Remember LAN Port
description: Remembers the last port used to Open to LAN.
body:
### Requirements

* [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) (Fabric API is not needed)

### Behavior

* Creates a config file `config/remember-lan-port.properties` with the default Minecraft server port value **25565** if it does not already exist

* Autofills the port from the config file into the *Open to LAN* menu; autofilled port number is green

* If the port has changed, saves it to the config file on successfully opening to LAN

* Only works across all worlds, not per-world

* That's it

### See Also

For more fully-featured LAN settings mods that support older game versions, try:

* [Custom LAN](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-lan)

* [LAN World Plug-n-Play (mcwifipnp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcwifipnp)
